text: Welcome, guide_sam! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you've joined us as an Event Helper. We're excited to have you — keep an eye on the events channel for upcoming opportunities to jump in!

Welcome, mentor_lina! 🎉 You've been approved as a Mentor — a role we truly value here. Please introduce yourself in the mentors channel and we'll get you set up with your first mentees soon. So glad to have you!

Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 You've been approved as a Moderator. We're thrilled to have you on the team — please check the moderator handbook and feel free to reach out if you have any questions.
